「All in us! 안녕하세요，있지입니다」












ITZY（韓語：있지；日語：イッジ），為韓國JYP娛樂旗下的五人女子團體。由五名韓國成員禮志、Lia、留真、彩領、有娜組成，2019年2月12日以首張單曲專輯《IT'z Different》正式出道。在JYP娛樂與GOT7，和前Wonder Girls成員宥斌、惠林同為二本部。團名意味著粉絲、大眾所盼望的一切，ITZY全都具備（EVERYTHING YOU WANT IT'Z IN US.），並把這樣的抱負濃縮成短而有力的口號「有嗎？有啊！」，就此形成了兼具特色與氣勢的團名。問候語為：「All in Us！大家好，我們是ITZY。」同時雙手比出剪刀手連在一起，形成反Z，翻轉形成Z的手勢。




官方粉絲名為「MIDZY (韓文 : 믿지)」。在2019年7月7日公布，其含意為「ITZY只相信MIDZY！」

ITZY's Yuna Talks About Her Reason Behind JYP Audition

ITZY's Yuna has shared the story of how she auditioned for JYP.

ITZY was the guest for the 'Idol Radio' on August 21st to promote their recent song 'ICY.'

During the show, Yuna shared an intimate story with the DJ BTOB's Ilhoon which surprised every audience and probably Ilhoon too. Yuna said, "My sister is a huge fan of BTOB. We together went to see them in one K-pop festival in 2015. There, one JYP staff saw me and asked if I would like to try out an audition."


As ITZY is the topmost trending K-pop group these days, Netizens said it is wonderful how a part of the beginning tracks down to BTOB. Netizens also commented on how they would have never missed out on her if they were JYP staff.

Such a surprise how Yuna followed her sister to the festival and had the lifetime chance to join JYP, and become such a wonderful celebrity she is now!
Ilhoon was pleased to hear the news, making a joke, "Good things happen when you become a fan of BTOB. Good things also follow you if you tuned in 'Idol Radio.'" The whole cast laughed.
